description: A production coordinator needs to arrange transportation for a 50-person film crew to a remote shooting location.

nodes.task_description: Get the crew size, location, and required dates from the production schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary logistical details.

nodes.task_description: Request quotes from several approved transportation vendors for bus rental.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives quotes from three different bus companies.

nodes.task_description: Select the most cost-effective vendor and book the transportation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the required buses for the shoot dates.
